reply: (1) This is an AutomationDirect GS10 Variable Frequency Drive, used to control the speed of a motor. (2) The most likely cause is a new conveyor belt causing an overload or imbalance. (3) The tech should check the motor current and compare it to the drive's overload settings. For an unknown fault, the tech should start by verifying the motor's current draw and comparing it to the drive's specifications.
